pwa.title: Install AxeZap on your phone
pwa.subtitle: Faster access from your home screen and better resilience on flaky networks (web app).
pwa.iosInstructions: On iPhone or iPad: tap Share (square with arrow) and choose Add to Home Screen.
pwa.fallbackHint: In your browser menu, look for "Install app", "Add to Home screen", or an install icon (⊕).
pwa.showManual: How to install without the button

nav.footer: Built for small teams — easy to use.

landingPage.metaTitle: AxeZap — Turn WhatsApp into automated sales
landingPage.metaDescription: Artificial intelligence that qualifies leads, books appointments, and sells on WhatsApp 24/7 without interruption.
landingPage.heroTitle: Turn WhatsApp Support into Automated Sales
landingPage.heroSubtitle: Artificial intelligence that qualifies leads, books time slots, and sells 24 hours a day, without interruption.
landingPage.heroCtaTrial: I want to try it for free
landingPage.heroCtaTrialAria: Try for free — opens WhatsApp or contact form
landingPage.heroCtaDemoAria: Watch a demo — opens external page or contact form

heroChatBubbles.text: I need a demo and pricing for my business.
Happy to help. How large is your team and what’s your main channel (WhatsApp, website)?
Great — I have slots tomorrow at 10am or Thursday at 3pm for a 20-minute call. Which works better?

landingPage.benefitsSub: Business-focused benefits: more conversions, less wasted time, and a calendar that stays organized.

benefits.title: 24/7 support with no waiting queues
benefits.description: Your AI agent serves customers on WhatsApp in real time. It answers questions, presents services, and completes the interaction naturally and without friction.

benefits.title: Intelligent lead qualification
benefits.description: Stop chasing cold contacts. Our system analyzes customer profile and assigns a purchase-intent score, surfacing the hottest leads for your team.

benefits.title: Full integration with your calendar
benefits.description: Automatic bookings synced straight to your calendar — fewer scheduling mistakes, fewer conflicts, and less reliance on manual operators.

landingPage.socialProofQuote: AxeZap cut our response time and increased bookings by over 30% in the first month of operation.
landingPage.howSub: Three steps to leave improvisation behind.

howSteps.title: Set up your workspace
howSteps.description: Enter the platform, set preferences, and wire the flow to how you operate.

howSteps.title: Feed the knowledge base
howSteps.description: Upload documents and content — the AI uses them to answer with substance.

howSteps.title: Serve and convert
howSteps.description: Let AI reply at customer pace and escalate only when it pays off.

landingPage.faqSub: Clarity before you commit — what teams usually ask.

faq.a: No — it extends capacity: handles routine and repetitive questions so humans focus on sensitive cases and closing deals.
The right setup anchors answers in documented knowledge and clear policies — fewer generic replies and better alignment with what you actually offer.
Yes. Flows can include booking so customers leave with a time slot, not just an answered curiosity.
Depends on your materials and channel — the goal is quick progress from first upload to guided, consistent conversations.
Treat data like any commercial channel: purpose-led collection, consent where applicable, and governance aligned with how you already operate.

landingPage.contactHeading: Ready to scale your business support?
landingPage.contactSub: Stop losing sales outside business hours. Connect AxeZap to your WhatsApp in under 10 minutes.
landingPage.finalCtaExpertAria: Go to the form to talk to a specialist
landingPage.tryAgentSub: Open WhatsApp with a pre-filled message — see pace, tone, and usefulness on mobile or desktop.
landingPage.tryAgentUnavailableHint: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_LANDING_WHATSAPP_PHONE in your environment to enable the WhatsApp button.
landingPage.floatWhatsAppAria: Open WhatsApp to try the agent

landingForm.name: Full name
landingForm.consent: I authorize the use of my data for commercial contact, under the applicable privacy policy.
landingForm.success: We received your message. We'll get back to you soon!
landingForm.errorGeneric: Could not send. Please try again later.
landingForm.errorValidation: Please check the fields and try again.
landingForm.errorUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again later.

loginPage.title: Sign in to the dashboard
loginPage.subtitle: Sign in with your Firebase account (email and password).
loginPage.firebaseNotConfigured: Firebase is not configured (NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* env vars).

registerPage.title: Create account
registerPage.subtitle: Use a valid invite code. Initial profile is BASIC.
registerPage.success: Account created and linked to tenant
registerPage.hasAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
registerPage.firebaseNotConfigured: Firebase is not configured (NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* env vars).

forgotPasswordPage.title: Reset password
forgotPasswordPage.subtitle: We will send a reset link by email (Firebase Authentication).
forgotPasswordPage.success: If the email exists, you will receive instructions shortly.
forgotPasswordPage.error: Could not send the email. Please try again.
forgotPasswordPage.firebaseNotConfigured: Firebase is not configured (NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_* env vars).

plan.lockedTitle: This feature requires a higher plan
plan.lockedAria: Area locked based on your subscription
plan.exportDialogDescription: CSV and PDF exports are available on the Enterprise plan.

requiredPlanHint.starter: Upgrade your plan to unlock this feature.
requiredPlanHint.pro: Upgrade to Professional or Enterprise to view these charts.
requiredPlanHint.enterprise: CSV and PDF exports are available on the Enterprise plan.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time metrics per account: customers, message volume, AI performance, and WhatsApp channel status.
dashboard.tenantHint: Account ID is set in Settings (shared with Monitoring and other areas).
dashboard.needAccount: Enter the Account ID to load metrics.

opportunities.title: Sales opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: Contacts with budget or scheduling intent who have not converted yet. Recover to turn off the AI and send a manual offer on WhatsApp.
opportunities.actionError: Could not complete the action. Try again.

dashboard.periodCustomInvalid: Choose a valid start and end (end after start).
dashboard.periodCustomDialogHint: Set start and end. Data refreshes when you apply.

cards.clientsDesc: Distinct contacts in the selected window (Total / Week / Month).
cards.messagesTodayDesc: Inbound user messages (UTC) for the current calendar day.
cards.aiRateDesc: Assistant replies successfully sent per user message in the same window.
cards.instanceDesc: Channel configuration from saved settings for this account.
cards.upcomingAppointmentsDesc: Confirmed starts in the next 7 days (shop timezone).

chart.title: Message volume
chart.subtitle: Trend for the selected window (hourly for Total; daily for Week and Month).

activities.title: Recent activity
activities.subtitle: Latest contact interactions and AI-detected intent.
activities.empty: No interactions recorded for this account.

primaryIntents.pieSubtitle: Share of conversations classified after closing or message threshold (same period as above).
primaryIntents.pieEmpty: No classified conversations in this period.

sentiment.title: Service health (sentiment)
sentiment.subtitle: Conversation tone classified by AI in the same period.
sentiment.empty: No conversations with classified sentiment in this period (legacy data or pipelines updating).

aiInsight.title: AI highlight
aiInsight.subtitle: Compared to the immediately preceding window of equal length.
aiInsight.spike: Attention: demand for {category} rose {percent}% compared to the previous period.
aiInsight.stable: No relevant increases (≥5%) for any intent compared to the previous period.
aiInsight.empty: No classified conversations this period — no highlight available.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.intro: Upload PDF or TXT to enrich assistant answers. Files are tied to the Account ID on the server.
knowledge.tenantHint: Saved locally in this browser; matches the account set in Settings and Monitoring.
knowledge.toastNeedAccount: Enter the Account ID before uploading.
knowledge.toastNeedFile: Choose a PDF or TXT file.
knowledge.toastSuccess: Ingestion complete: the file was indexed successfully.
knowledge.toastDeleted: File removed from the knowledge base.

knowledgeUpload.dropTitle: Drop PDF, TXT or Markdown (.md) here, or click to choose
knowledgeUpload.dropHint: Then use the Send button to index on the server.

knowledgeTable.title: Files in the base
knowledgeTable.subtitle: Documents indexed for the assistant (RAG). Updated from the server.
knowledgeTable.emptyIndexed: No indexed files for this account. Upload a PDF, TXT or Markdown (.md) above.
knowledgeTable.emptyNeedAccount: Enter the Account ID above to see indexed files.

knowledgeDelete.title: Delete file
knowledgeDelete.confirm: Remove {fileName} from the knowledge base? Chunks will no longer be used in answers.

settings.title: Client (tenant) configuration
settings.subtitle: Business profile, plan, compliance, calendar, services, WhatsApp, portal users, and invites.
settings.tenantHint: Saved locally (same value as the knowledge base and test chat). When changed, settings reload from the server.
settings.personalityPlaceholder: Describe tone and context for the assistant…
settings.personalityHint: Defines the system prompt sent to the AI model (channel persona).
settings.providerHint: Simulated logs replies; Meta and Evolution send real messages when the backend is configured.
settings.simulatedBlurb: No credentials needed. The channel does not send real messages — useful for development and tests.
settings.metaPhoneHint: Meta for Developers → your WhatsApp app → API Setup: copy the Phone number ID for production or test.
settings.metaTokenHint: Meta panel → WhatsApp → API Setup: create a temporary token or configure a System User with a permanent token.
settings.evoUrlHint: Public base URL of Evolution API (no trailing slash). Values are stored on the account (server); you do not need the .env file to change them here.
settings.evoInstanceHint: Instance name from Evolution Manager / pairing — must match the server record.
settings.evoKeyHint: May match the global Evolution key on the server; stored persistently for this account.
settings.evoPairingHint: Use when you need a fresh QR — open WhatsApp on the phone → Linked Devices → Link a device.
settings.evoPairingAlt: QR code linking WhatsApp to the bot
settings.toastNeedAccount: Enter the Account ID before saving.
settings.sectionPlanDesc: Your account profile determines which portal areas are available. Changes are made by the AxeZap team or internal backoffice.
settings.planCodeHint: Technical code returned by the server for this tenant.
settings.sectionBusinessDesc: Reference data for the establishment (may be used for internal context; not all fields are auto-posted to WhatsApp).
settings.sectionBillingDesc: Commercial control: mark whether the client is in good standing. Set the default slot duration (e.g. 30 min).
settings.billingCompliant: Client is in good standing (plan / billing)
settings.billingCompliantHint: Manual for now. Automatic payment webhooks are a possible future product step.
settings.defaultSlotHint: Used for planning; keep aligned with Google Calendar and your operations.
settings.sectionCalendarDesc: Calendar ID (service account), spreadsheet URL, and access notes (credentials, how-to).
settings.googleCalendarIdHint: Calendar email or xxx@group.calendar.google.com for the Calendar API.
settings.spreadsheetUrlHint: Link to a planning sheet if the team uses one alongside the product.
settings.calendarAccessNotesHint: Free text — keep confidential. Automatic invite email is not enabled yet: copy the code and share manually with the client if needed.
settings.sectionWhatsappNumberDesc: The number to show to customers (separate from Meta/Evolution technical credentials).
settings.whatsappBusinessNumberHint: For reference; real delivery still uses Phone Number ID / Evolution below.
settings.whatsappIntegrationReadOnlyDesc: These values are set by your team in the back office. You can generate a new QR code to reconnect WhatsApp.
settings.sectionServicesDesc: List tied to booking and the tenant service catalog. Click save after editing rows.
settings.sectionPortalUsersDesc: Firebase accounts linked to this tenant. See email in Firebase console; we only store the UID in the database here.
settings.noPortalUsers: No other users, or still loading.
settings.sectionInviteDesc: Generate a code for the client (or a teammate) to complete registration (POST /v1/auth/register) with their Firebase sign-in.
settings.inviteNoEmail: Provide the recipient email and the system sends the invite automatically.
settings.inviteEmailRequired: Enter an email address to send the invite.
settings.inviteEmailInvalid: Enter a valid email address for the invite.
settings.inviteDialogTitle: Invite code (copy now — shown once here)
settings.movedToClientsDesc: Business details, compliance, Google Calendar/Spreadsheet, catalog, users, invite, and business number now live in Internal > Tenants > Clients.

internalTenants.title: Internal backoffice — tenants
internalTenants.subtitle: Internal use (COMERCIAL profile): create tenant, set plan, contact email and invite. The table summarizes every account.
internalTenants.evolutionAutoHint: When Evolution is configured on the server, the WhatsApp instance is created automatically when you register the tenant.
internalTenants.clientTabSubtitle: Everything below applies only to this tenant.
internalTenants.manualEmailHint: The invite is sent automatically by email when an address is provided.
internalTenants.searchPlaceholder: Search by tenant, name or contact…
internalTenants.selectTenantFirst: Select a tenant from the list to edit client data.

internalPlans.title: Plan management
internalPlans.subtitle: ULTRA admin only. Control feature checks per plan and quantitative limits.

testChat.title: Test chat
testChat.subtitle: Conversation-style UI: your message on the right, the AI on the left.
testChat.panelSubtitle: Messages in this session (until you reload the page)
testChat.emptyHint: Start by sending a question below.

monitor.title: Message monitoring
monitor.subtitle: Numbers that interacted via WhatsApp and history per contact. Auto-refresh every {seconds} seconds.
monitor.needAccountWarning: Enter the Account ID to load WhatsApp conversations.
monitor.needAccountBody: Enter the Account ID to see conversations.
monitor.chooseContact: Choose a contact on the left to see messages.
monitor.handoffSuccess: Human mode on; the customer was notified.
monitor.activeChatPlaceholder: Write a message to the customer…
monitor.activeChatDisabledHint: Take over the chat (turn off the AI) to send messages.

appointments.title: Appointments (AI)
appointments.subtitle: Commitments created by the assistant and stored for your account.
appointments.needAccount: Set the Account ID to list appointments.

crm.title: Customer record
crm.noConversationId: No conversation ID linked to this row.
crm.messagesEmpty: No messages in the database for this contact.
crm.noCrmRow: No CRM row yet for this conversation.
crm.aiInsightEmpty: No automatic analysis for this profile.

chatBubble.statusReceived: Processing delivery — waiting for server confirmation

errors.serverUnavailable: Could not connect to the server. Please try again.
errors.chatAssistantFailed: Could not get a reply from the assistant.
errors.ingestFailed: Could not finish uploading the file.
errors.invalidMessagesArray: Message response is not a list
errors.listKnowledgeFailed: Could not list knowledge base files.
errors.invalidKnowledgeArray: Knowledge base response is not a list
errors.loginFailed: Could not sign in. Check email and password.
errors.registerFailed: Could not complete registration. Check your invite code.
errors.humanReplyFailed: Could not send the message via WhatsApp.
errors.appointmentsLookupFailed: Could not look up contact appointments.
errors.crmSummaryFailed: Could not load the customer record.
